subcodes.first_line: O thou sweet-singing Shahnaz! Thy letter and the Unity Magazines received. Today the Press of the world belonging to various nations
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شهناز خوش آواز نامه و جریده رسید حال جرائد عالم از هر ملتی خطابهای احباء
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @newspapers and the media; publications
